title: dendrochilum anfractum
intro: Dendrochilum anfractum, also known as the twisted leaf orchid, is a type of orchid found in the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Dendrochilum anfractum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture or decoction for its medicinal properties to be fully utilized.
